text: [Injured] Thigh injury Suffered a thigh injury in Brazil’s match against Senegal on 15/11 and withdrew from the squad thereafter. Has been sidelined since. His manager said he was still weeks away as of 2/12. [Source]
[Injured] Ankle injury Ruled out for "weeks" on 9/12 with an ankle injury. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury Suffered a knee injury in the opening match of 2025/26 and underwent surgery at the end of August. Faces a long spell on the sidelines. His manager said on 2/12 that he needs more time. [Source]

[Injured] Ankle injury Substituted after landing awkwardly on his ankle in the match against Brentford on 3/12. His manager said on 5/12 that it was a "more complicated" injury. A day later it was confirmed he would be out for "weeks". [Source]

[Doubt 75%] Hamstring injury Came off with a hamstring injury in the match against Wolves on 13/12. His manager said after full-time that they will know more about the issue in the coming days. Reports suggest he could be out for over a month. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Taken off with a knee injury in the match against Wolves on 30/11. His manager has since ruled him out for over two months. [Source]

[Doubt 75%] Back injury Missed the Basel game on 11/12 with the niggling back injury that had ruled him out of the previous Europa League game. Sat out the West Ham game on 14/12 but his manager hopes he'll return to training the following week. [Source]

[Injured] Hamstring injury Suffered a hamstring injury in the match against Liverpool on 1/11 and his manager expects him to be sidelined for “weeks”. His manager said after the West Ham game on 14/12 that he'd return in "more or less" two weeks. [Source]
[Unavailable] Ineligible to face his parent club on 21/12.

[Injured] Calf injury Substituted late in the Arsenal game on 6/12 and was pictured with ice on his calf. Missed the Europa League match against Basel on 11/12 and the West Ham game on 14/12. His manager said after the latter fixture that he'd return in "more or less" two weeks. [Source]
[Doubt 50%] Knee injury Came off in the match against Manchester United game on 15/12 with a knee injury. His manager think it's a MCL injury rather than anything season-ending. [Source]
[Doubt 25%] Muscle injury Revealed to be recovering from a muscle injury as of 7/11. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Suffered a knee injury while playing for Scotland and will not feature against Sunderland on 29/11. His manager said he could be out for three or four weeks. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Suffered a suspected hamstring injury on 18/11 while playing for Scotland. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury Is "struggling" with a knee injury sustained on 2/12 and his manager says it will be "difficult" for him to be fit to face Chelsea on 6/12. Missed out then and he was subsequently confirmed as sidelined for 2-3 months. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury It was reported on 20/11 that he had sustained an anterior cruciate ligament injury and would be out for the rest of the season. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Recovering from an anterior cruciate ligament injury. Reports suggest he will be back in contention in the New Year. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Knock Missed the cup tie against Manchester City on 18/12 with a “knock”. Was “not far off” being involved. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury His club reported on 15/10 that he had suffered an ACL injury and had undergone season-ending surgery. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Knock Missed the cup tie against Manchester City on 18/12 with a “knock”. Was “not far off” being involved. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Knock Missed the Tottenham Hotspur game on 6/12 with a knock picked up the previous week. Was expected to be in contention to return against Leeds on 14/12 but wasn’t risked. [Source]
[Unavailable] International Duty On international duty at the Africa Cup of Nations from Gameweek 17 onwards.
[Unavailable] International Duty On international duty at the Africa Cup of Nations from Gameweek 17 onwards.
[Unavailable] International Duty On international duty at the Africa Cup of Nations from Gameweek 17 onwards.
[Suspended] 1 Match Ban Suspended for one match after picking up his fifth booking of the season on 13/12.
[Suspended] 1 Match Ban Suspended for one match after picking up his fifth booking of the season on 13/12.

[Injured] Knee injury Missed the Newcastle game on 4/5 with a knee injury. Ruled out for the rest of the 2024/25 season on 9/5. Hasn’t featured at all in pre-season or in 2025/26 so far. Around 2-3 weeks away from a return as of 12/12. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Suffered a knee injury in the match against Aston Villa on 3/12. He will be out for the season after ACL damage was detected. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury His manager confirmed on 26/7 that he will undergo surgery on a knee ligament injury. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Reports in July suggest he has undergone surgery on an ACL injury. Faces a long spell on the sidelines. [Source]

[Injured] Hamstring injury Returned from a long-term knee injury in pre-season but had a small setback with a hamstring injury and has been sidelined since. His manager reported another setback on 16/10. [Source]
[Unavailable] International Duty On international duty at the Africa Cup of Nations from Gameweek 17 onwards.
[Injured] Muscle injury Revealed to be sidelined with an injury on 2/12 and "a few weeks away". [Source]
[Unavailable] International Duty On international duty at the Africa Cup of Nations from Gameweek 17 onwards.

[Injured] Achilles injury Missed the start of the season. Had been training and aiming for a return to action after the October international break but he has had a setback and will be out for “a few months”. [Source]
[Unavailable] International Duty On international duty at the Africa Cup of Nations from Gameweek 17 onwards.
[Injured] Muscle injury Missed the cup tie against Cardiff on 16/12 with a minor muscle injury. Won’t return against Newcastle on 20/12 but expected to be available thereafter. [Source]
[Injured] Thigh injury Underwent thigh surgery on 9/9 and will be sidelined for a while. His manager said he had returned to training on 28/11 but has since suffered a setback. [Source]

[Injured] Anterior cruciate ligament It was revealed on 7/8 that he has suffered an anterior cruciate ligament injury and has since had an operation. He is expected to miss most of the 2025/26 season. [Source]

[Injured] Shoulder injury Came off after suffering a shoulder injury in the match against Bournemouth on 6/12. His manager said afterwards that it "looks quite bad" and that he "has to be out". Has avoided a fracture but faces a spell on the sidelines. His manager said on 12/12 that he could be "2-4 weeks out" but that the exact timeline wasn't known. [Source]

[Injured] Thigh injury Substituted early in the game against Qarabag on 5/11 with a quad injury. Has been sidelined since. His manager said on 5/12 that there is still no return date for him. [Source]
[Suspended] Provisionally suspended by the Football Association after failing a drugs test. [Source]

[Injured] Groin Injury Missed the AZ Alkmaar game on 6/11 with an abductor injury and hasn’t played since. Had a further setback in his recovery and his manager ruled him out for a further 4-6 weeks on 17/12. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury Ruled out of the Brentford game on 26/1 with a knee injury. It was subsequently revealed that he would miss the rest of the season and the start of 2025/26. Hasn’t been seen since. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Taken off with a hamstring injury in the match against Man City on 14/12. Ruled out for 8-10 weeks. [Source]
[Injured] Back injury Has missed most of pre-season with back problems and his manager said on 8/8 that he does not know when he will return. Hasn’t been seen since. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Missed the Fulham game on 7/12 with what was originally described as a minor knee issue. He has since undergone surgery and will be out for 4-6 weeks. [Source]

[Doubt 25%] Lack of match fitness Has been out since January with a knee injury. Had been on the cusp of returning against Alkmaar on 6/11 but had a setback. Being partly reintegrated into team training as of 10/12. Likely to get game-time with the under-21s first before being considered for a first-team return. [Source]
[Unavailable] International Duty On international duty at the Africa Cup of Nations from Gameweek 17 onwards.

[Injured] Hamstring injury Picked up a hamstring injury in August and has been sidelined since. Suffered a setback in October and underwent surgery. Back on the grass as of 12/12 but not available. [Source]

[Injured] Hamstring injury Taken off with a hamstring injury in the match against Man Utd on 24/11. His manager described it as a “small” issue initially but he is still sidelined as of 5/12 and will be out for "a little while". [Source]

[Doubt 75%] Hamstring injury Taken off early in the match against Chelsea on 13/12 with a hamstring injury. His manager said afterwards that it was too early to determine the severity of the issue. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Hamstring injury Taken off in the match against Chelsea on 13/12 after suffering hamstring discomfort. [Source]
[Unavailable] International Duty On international duty at the Africa Cup of Nations from Gameweek 17 onwards.
[Unavailable] International Duty On international duty at the Africa Cup of Nations from Gameweek 17 onwards.
[Injured] Hernia Has been sidelined since the November international break with a hernia. Back on the grass as of 12/12 but not available. [Source]
[Unavailable] International Duty On international duty at the Africa Cup of Nations from Gameweek 17 onwards.
[Unavailable] International Duty On international duty at the Africa Cup of Nations from Gameweek 17 onwards.
[Unavailable] International Duty On international duty at the Africa Cup of Nations from Gameweek 17 onwards.
[Doubt 75%] Groin Injury Taken off at half-time of the Newcastle game on 17/12 as a precaution because of groin tightness. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Felt discomfort in his hamstring and had to come off in the match against Everton on 8/11. He will now undergo surgery and is set to be out until the New Year. [Source]

[Injured] Hamstring injury Missed the Crystal Palace game on 7/12 with a hamstring issue. Will sit out the Burnley match on 13/12 as well but his manager does not think it is a serious injury. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury His manager said he had injured his hamstring on 2/12 and will miss at least the next eight weeks. [Source]
[Injured] Calf injury It was revealed on 27/11 that he has suffered a calf injury and is expected to miss 4-6 weeks. [Source]

[Doubt 50%] Hamstring injury Described as a "major doubt" for the game against Liverpool on 6/12 because of a hamstring injury sustained in the previous match. Missed out. Ruled out of the next match against Brentford on 14/12 but could be back after that. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Missed the whole of pre-season with a hamstring injury but returned to light training during the September international break. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Has been sidelined since September with a hamstring injury but it was reported on 5/12 that he was back on the grass doing ball work and ahead of schedule. [Source]
[Injured] Ankle injury His manager confirmed on 12/12 that he'd remain out for "weeks" with an ankle injury that kept him out of the Inter game three days earlier. [Source]

[Injured] Hamstring injury Taken off with a hamstring injury in the match against Eintracht Frankfurt on 22/10. His manager thinks he will be out for “weeks”. Confirmed as out until after the November international break but there is no precise return date yet. [Source]
[Injured] Muscle injury Ruled out for a "few weeks" with an injury he picked up against Leeds on 6/12. [Source]
[Doubt 25%] Muscle injury Taken off with a muscle injury in the match against Brighton on 13/12. His manager does not expect him to be available for the next game. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Stretchered off with a serious knee injury in the match against Southampton on 23/9. Has torn his ACL and will be out for a year. [Source]
[Unavailable] International Duty On international duty at the Africa Cup of Nations from Gameweek 17 onwards.
[Doubt 75%] Ankle injury Suffered an ankle injury in the match against Brighton on 13/12. His manager said afterwards that it "didn't look great" but that he would "hope for the best". [Source]
[Unavailable] International Duty On international duty at the Africa Cup of Nations from Gameweek 17 onwards.
[Doubt 75%] Hamstring injury Came off early in the match against Brentford on 17/12 with a hamstring injury. [Source]
[Injured] Leg injury Missed the Crystal Palace game on 14/12 with a leg injury. Ruled out for "two to three weeks" on 16/12. [Source]
[Injured] Muscle injury Missed the Borussia Dortmund game on 5/11 because he “didn’t feel perfect”. Has been absent since and remains out as of 12/12 but is at least on the grass rehabbing. [Source]
[Injured] Ankle injury Missed the Bournemouth game on 2/11 with an ankle injury. His manager said "he will be out for a while". [Source]
[Unavailable] International Duty On international duty at the Africa Cup of Nations from Gameweek 17 onwards.

[Doubt 25%] Thigh injury Missed the Sunderland game on 6/12 with a leg injury. Won't be involved against Real Madrid on 10/12 and his manager does not know how long he will be out. Man City coach Kolo Toure said on 12/12 that he wasn't expected to be out for long. [Source]
[Injured] Back injury Missed the West Ham game on 4/12 with a niggling back injury. Still sidelined as of 12/12. [Source]
[Suspended] 1 Match Ban Suspended for one match after picking up his fifth booking of the season on 15/12.
[Injured] Hamstring injury Taken off with what looked like a hamstring injury in the match against Tottenham Hotspur on 8/11. Has been sidelined since and remains out as of 12/12. [Source]
[Unavailable] International Duty On international duty at the Africa Cup of Nations from Gameweek 17 onwards.
[Unavailable] International Duty On international duty at the Africa Cup of Nations from Gameweek 17 onwards.
[Unavailable] International Duty On international duty at the Africa Cup of Nations from Gameweek 17 onwards.

[Doubt 25%] Back injury His manager confirmed on 28/11 that he is nursing a back problem. Missed out the following day against Everton and has been sidelined since. His manager said on 5/12 that he had been given an injection but that it would take a week or so to settle down. Still no closer to a return date as of 16/12. [Source]
[Injured] Rib Injury Taken off with a rib injury in the match against Sunderland on 14/12. Ruled out for "around four to six weeks" on 16/12. [Source]

[Doubt 75%] Hamstring injury Missed the cup tie against Fulham on 17/12 with hamstring discomfort. His manager is sure it is not a serious injury but didn’t know whether he’d be fit for Chelsea on 20/12. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury Picked up a knee injury on international duty with Sweden and missed the Manchester City match on 22/11 as a result. Has been absent since. Aiming to return around New Year. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Knee injury Substituted in the cup tie against Fulham on 17/12 with what his manager fears is a knee injury. [Source]
[Doubt 25%] Ankle injury Withdrew from the squad to face Athletic Club on 5/11 because of a niggling ankle injury. Faces “weeks” out as he recovers from it. Still out as of 16/12. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Groin Injury Missed the Everton game on 29/11 with a groin issue. His manager said on 5/12 that he may be out for another 2-3 weeks. Expected to return on 17/12 or 20/12. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Missed the Man City match on 22/11 and faces around a month out with a hamstring issue. His manager said on 16/12 that he was aiming to return in the New Year. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Suffered a hamstring injury in Nigeria’s match against South Africa on 9/9. Looks set for at least three months out. "Still a bit of time" away as of 4/12. [Source]
[Doubt 25%] Lack of match fitness Has been sidelined since the November international break but "on the grass" and "doing well" as of 4/12. [Source]
[Unavailable] International Duty On international duty at the Africa Cup of Nations from Gameweek 17 onwards.
[Doubt 75%] Knee injury Missed the Tottenham game on 14/12 with a knee injury. [Source]
[Unavailable] International Duty On international duty at the Africa Cup of Nations from Gameweek 17 onwards.
[Doubt 75%] Groin Injury Won't be risked in the match against Utrecht on 11/12 because of a tight groin. Hoping to return against Spurs on 14/12. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Missed the Porto game on 23/10 and has been sidelined since. On the grass as of 11/12 but still some way from a return. [Source]

[Injured] Hamstring injury Taken off after himself coming on as a substitute on 6/12. His manager has confirmed it is a hamstring injury and that it is "going to be a slow one". Likely to be out until January. [Source]
[Injured] Shoulder injury Missed the start of the season with a shoulder injury. A month away as of 2/10. [Source]
[Unavailable] International Duty On international duty at the Africa Cup of Nations from Gameweek 17 onwards.
[Doubt 25%] Lack of match fitness Recovered from an Achilles injury that saw him miss the start of the season. Featured for the under-21s on 20/11 but not ready for a first-team comeback. [Source]
[Unavailable] International Duty On international duty at the Africa Cup of Nations from Gameweek 17 onwards.
[Unavailable] International Duty On international duty at the Africa Cup of Nations from Gameweek 17 onwards.
[Suspended] 3 Match Ban Suspended for three matches after being sent off for serious foul play on 6/12.

[Doubt 75%] Lack of match fitness Back in training in November after recovering from a knee injury sustained in January. Has since played 45 minutes and 65 minutes in two behind-closed-doors friendlies and could make the matchday squad soon. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury Taken off with a knock in the match against Crystal Palace on 11/5. It later transpired that he had sustained a knee injury and would need season-ending surgery. Missed the start of 2025/26 and is still out as of 4/12. [Source]
[Injured] Anterior cruciate ligament Suffered an anterior cruciate ligament injury in pre-season and will miss a significant period of 2025/26. [Source]
[Unavailable] International Duty On international duty at the Africa Cup of Nations from Gameweek 17 onwards.
[Injured] Ankle injury Missed the Bournemouth game on 30/8 with an ankle injury. Has been sidelined since and underwent minor surgery. Still out as of 4/12. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Lack of match fitness Played 45 minutes in a friendly on 2/12 after missing the start of the season with foot and thigh injuries. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Missed the Brentford game on 6/12 with a soft tissue injury. Ruled out until January with a hamstring issue on 8/12. [Source]
[Unavailable] International Duty On international duty at the Africa Cup of Nations from Gameweek 17 onwards.
[Doubt 25%] Back injury It was reported on 6/11 that he was currently sidelined with a back injury. [Source]

[Unavailable] International Duty On international duty at the Africa Cup of Nations from Gameweek 17 onwards.
[Injured] Hamstring injury Came off in the match against Man Utd on 8/12. Ruled out for at least six weeks on 12/12. [Source]
[Injured] Ankle injury Has been sidelined since November with an ankle problem. Remains “weeks” away as of 28/11. [Source]
[Unavailable] International Duty On international duty at the Africa Cup of Nations from Gameweek 17 onwards.
[Injured] Knee injury It was revealed on 22/1 that he had suffered a season-ending knee injury that may even keep him out of the start of 2025/26. [Source]
[Injured] Groin Injury Picked up a groin injury in the cup tie against Chelsea on 29/10. Underwent surgery on 3/11 and will be out for 8-12 weeks. [Source]
[Suspended] 1 Match Ban Suspended for one match after picking up his fifth booking of the season on 13/12.
[Injured] Calf injury Injured after himself coming on as a substitute in the match against Nottingham Forest on 3/12. His managed ruled him out for around six weeks on 8/12. [Source]
